channel.title: timestamp on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in timestamp on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Create Timestamp with GitHub Actions
item.description: In case you are into calver or have another reason to create a timestamp with GitHub Actions, do the following: name:<PIPELINE>jobs:build:runs-on:<RUN_ON>steps:- name:Create release versionid:<ID>run:echo "::set-output name=<NAME>::$(date +'%Y.%m.%d-%H%M%S')" <PIPELINE>: The name of your pipeline. <RUN_ON>: The runner to use, see GitHub’s own documentation for possible values. <ID>: The unique ID of the timestamp step. <NAME>: The name of the created timestamp. The special syntax ::set-output name=<NAME>:: declares that the output of the command (echo) should be saved in a variable called <NAME>.
